body:
Part 1 (first 6 chapters) of our Textbook is now final with extensive practice exercises and quizzes. All faculty and students will give two exams covering part 1, get ready:
Exam 1: Covers chapters 1-3
Exam 2: Covers chapters 4-6
https://agentfactory.panaversity.org/docs/General-Agents-Foundations
The book is now also implementing technology to make it an AI Native Interactive Book, first of the kind in the world.
